inputs.label: Wall Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the wall to be built. Standard construction practice.

inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the wall. Standard construction practice.

inputs.label: Brick Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of a single brick. Common brick size per ISO 9001.

inputs.label: Brick Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of a single brick. Common brick size per ISO 9001.

inputs.label: Brick Depth
inputs.businessContext: Depth of a single brick. Common brick size per ISO 9001.

inputs.label: Mortar Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of mortar joints. Standard construction practice per ASTM C270.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of bricks wasted due to breakage or cutting. Industry standard 5-10%.

inputs.label: Bond Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of brick bond pattern. Affects brick count per area. Common masonry standards.

thresholds.wasteFactor > 10: High waste factor may indicate poor quality control or handling.
thresholds.mortarThickness > 15: Thick mortar joints may reduce structural integrity.

suggestedActions: wasteFactor > 10 ? 'Review material handling and cutting processes to reduce waste.' : ''
mortarThickness > 15 ? 'Consider using thinner mortar joints to improve strength and reduce material cost.' : ''
